suite.name: API ItineraLogin

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://itineraioapi-ebdthgaebndcddam.westus2-01.azurewebsites.net/User/Login path_url=/User/Login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '54', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "karencadavos@gmail.com", "password": "123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://itineraioapi-ebdthgaebndcddam.westus2-01.azurewebsites.net/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com path_url=/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

suite.doc: This is the API test suite for Itinera Login functionality.

suite.name: E2E Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://itineraioapi-ebdthgaebndcddam.westus2-01.azurewebsites.net/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com path_url=/User/GetUserInfoByEmail/karencadavos@gmail.com headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: This is the E2E test suite for Itinera Login functionality. This compares the API response VS the UI data

suite.name: ItineraLogin

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Hi Karen Two'.
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Hi Karen Anne'.
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: This is the UI test suite for Itinera Login functionality.
